titles.title: Did you feel the mountains tremble?

authors.author: Martin Smith
Martin Smith
Spürst du, wie die Berge beben

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Did you feel the mountains tremble? Did you hear the oceans roar? When the people rose to sing of Jesus Christ the risen one

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Did you feel the people tremble? Did you hear the singers roar? When the lost began to sing of Jesus Christ the risen one

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And we can see that God you're moving A mighty river through the nations And young and old will turn to Jesus Fling wide your heavenly gates Prepare the way of the risen Lord

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Open up the doors and let the music play Let the streets resound with singing Songs that bring your hope Songs that bring your peace Dancers who dance upon injustice

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Did you feel the darkness tremble? When all the saints join in one song And all the streams flow as one river To wash away our brokenness

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And here we see that God you're moving A time of Jubilee is coming When young and old return to Jesus Fling wide your heavenly gates Prepare the way of the risen Lord
